tools.title: Tools
tools.subtitle: Programming languages, libraries, helpers, components, utils, LLM skills & plugins

items.heading: AG Grid
items.text: Advanced data grid for enterprise dashboards with virtual scrolling, row grouping, pivoting, and server-side data models handling millions of rows.

items.heading: Angular
items.text: Full-featured web application framework by Google.

items.heading: Ant Design
items.text: Enterprise UI design system.

items.heading: API Design
items.text: Design RESTful endpoints with consistent naming, proper status codes, and pagination.

items.heading: Astro
items.text: Content-focused static site builder. Ships zero JavaScript by default and supports any UI framework through islands architecture.

items.heading: Auth0
items.text: Authentication and authorization platform.

items.text: Serverless compute.

items.heading: Axios

items.heading: Babel

items.heading: Biome
items.text: Unified formatter and linter — replaces Prettier and ESLint with one fast tool.

items.heading: Bug Detection
items.text: Find potential issues, race conditions, and edge cases through static analysis and pattern matching across your entire codebase.

items.heading: Chakra UI

items.heading: Changesets

items.heading: Cloudflare Workers
items.text: Edge computing platform that runs your code in 300+ cities worldwide with sub-millisecond cold starts.

items.heading: cmdk
items.text: Command palette component. Fast, composable, and unstyled — add a Spotlight-like search to any React app.

items.heading: Code Review

items.heading: Commit Message

items.heading: D3.js

items.heading: DaisyUI
items.text: Tailwind CSS component library that adds semantic class names — write button instead of px-4 py-2 bg-blue-500 text-white rounded.

items.heading: Database Explorer
items.text: Schema visualization and query builder — browse tables, inspect relationships, and generate optimized queries from natural language.

items.heading: date-fns
items.text: Modern date utility library with a functional API and tree-shakeable modules — take only what you need without bloating your bundle.

items.heading: Deno
items.text: Secure TypeScript runtime with built-in tooling — formatter, linter, test runner, and package manager all in a single binary.

items.heading: Django

items.heading: Docker

items.heading: Git

items.heading: React Hook Form

items.heading: Renovate
items.text: Automated dependency updates that open PRs with changelogs, test results, and merge confidence scores — keep your stack fresh without the manual toil.

items.heading: Resend
items.text: Email API for developers.

items.heading: Ruby on Rails
items.text: Convention-over-configuration web framework.

items.heading: Rust
items.text: Systems programming language with memory safety guarantees enforced at compile time through ownership and borrowing, eliminating entire classes of bugs without garbage collection.

items.heading: S3
items.text: Object storage service for files, images, backups, and static assets with virtually unlimited capacity and fine-grained access controls.

items.text: Generate and review database schema changes with rollback strategies.

items.heading: Sentry
items.text: Error tracking and performance monitoring.

items.text: Copy-paste UI components built on Radix — not a package, but a collection of reusable components you own and customize directly in your codebase.

items.heading: Sharp
items.text: High-performance image processing.

items.heading: Slack Notifier

items.heading: Sonner
items.text: Toast notification component.

items.heading: Stripe
items.text: Payment processing API for subscriptions, one-time charges, and marketplaces.

items.heading: Supabase
items.text: Open source Firebase alternative with Postgres, auth, storage, and real-time subscriptions.

items.heading: Svelte
items.text: Compile-time reactive framework that shifts work from runtime to build step, producing tiny bundles with no virtual DOM overhead.

items.heading: SvelteKit
items.text: Full-stack Svelte app framework.

items.heading: Tailwind CSS
items.text: Utility-first CSS framework that lets you build designs directly in markup without writing custom CSS files, using composable utility classes for rapid UI development.

items.heading: Terminal Helper
items.text: CLI assistance.

items.heading: Test Generation
items.text: Auto-create unit and integration tests.

items.heading: Three.js
items.text: 3D graphics in the browser using WebGL and WebGPU. Create immersive scenes, animations, and interactive 3D experiences.

items.heading: tRPC
items.text: End-to-end type-safe APIs without code generation. Share types between client and server automatically through TypeScript inference.

items.heading: Turborepo
items.text: High-performance monorepo build system that caches task outputs locally and remotely, so you never rebuild what hasn't changed.

items.heading: Type Inference
items.text: Suggest TypeScript types for untyped code.

items.heading: TypeScript
items.text: Static typing for JavaScript that catches errors at compile time and supercharges your editor with autocomplete, refactoring, and navigation across large codebases.

items.heading: Upstash
items.text: Serverless Redis and Kafka with per-request pricing — perfect for edge functions and serverless architectures where persistent connections aren't available.

items.heading: Vaul
items.text: Drawer component for React with smooth animations and snap points.

items.heading: Vercel
items.text: Frontend deployment platform with edge functions.

items.text: Next generation frontend build tool with instant HMR.

items.heading: Vitest
items.text: Blazing fast unit testing powered by Vite.

items.heading: VS Code Extension
items.text: Editor integration with inline suggestions, quick fixes, and context-aware completions.

items.heading: Vue.js
items.text: Progressive JavaScript framework with an approachable core and a rich ecosystem of supporting libraries for routing, state management, and build tooling.

items.heading: Webpack
items.text: Module bundler that transforms and bundles JavaScript, CSS, images, and other assets through a plugin-based architecture with code splitting support.

items.heading: WebSocket
items.text: Full-duplex communication protocol for real-time features like chat, collaboration, and live updates.

items.heading: Zod
items.text: TypeScript-first schema validation with static type inference.

items.heading: Zustand
items.text: Lightweight state management with a simple hook-based API — no providers, no boilerplate, just a store and a hook.
